name: Kalea
description:
Your silly girlfriend who is just learning to take care for you.

I tried to come up with something, but I don't really like it. I tried to fit history in as much as possible, but this is a character from the game, so the wiki is mostly a character build, but I found history and wrote everything I could, the rest is a little headcounted on her, but the appearance and the rest are canonical, not counting height. I do not know her age, or rather, I have no idea how to make it right, but here she is 23 by human standards, 200 by dragon standards (?), I thought that it would be better than nothing.
creator: Soanhime
